reviews.review_description: As an 80's baby this is what VR is for! I love this game! Worth every penny!
Really enjoyed it. Would love to see more levels and varieties of enemies. Maybe some nighttime and inclement weather would be a nice touch. Thanks.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review! SPOILER FOLLOWS... 



If you complete all the stages, you unlock night (expert) mode! This is more difficult and really requires more stealth when you play!

reviews.review_title: Such a cool game on Quest 2!
reviews.review_description: I purchased this a few years ago on oculus Go and was gutted i couldnt down load it on the oculus store for Quest2. Thanks to Sidequestvr.com it's now possible to play this kickass title on Quest2. Just love everything about this game. The camera view and angles are ace. The sound is good. The animations are brilliant. Just a really cool game and something different for VR. What other titles have the Dev's made as I'd like to play more from these dudes. Thanks such a cool game!!!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the great review! Please also check out https://www.oculus.com/experiences/quest/5840996212640315/ which I also release on Quest 2.

reviews.review_description: For $10, this has got to be one of the best bang for buck games in the oculus store there is. There is a single player campaign, multiplayer vs, coop and survival mode. Please keep updating this game. This is the best top down shooter on quest, hands down, so far!

reviews.review_title: Great game please add passthrough mode.
reviews.review_description: Great game would be perfect with passthrough mode.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! Passthrough mode has been added to the latest release (activate with the X Button on the left controller).

reviews.review_description: I personally enjoyed the game. It's a mobile port of a game to VR done really well. I have some gameplay + thoughts up on my channel here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2QV47SdtGRE&t=119s

controls very well with touch controllers as gamepad, good graphics, awesome perspective in VR as if you're playing a regular game in a holographic projector. Wish there were more such games trying this.

it's good, but with just 8 missions there's neither much to do nor enough to do besides the single mechanic from the very beginning: dodge and shoot. I also played in co-op with a few different players, there seems to be enough of them, possibly mobile phone users or from switch...

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! In terms of replay:
- Once you complete the 8 campaign missions it unlocks Expert mode. You can play the missions again during night time setting.
- Completing all stages with just the solider also unlocks a special surprise.

reviews.review_description: I can drop in anytime for some stealthy bot blasting.

reviews.review_title: Must have for any twin stick shooter fan
reviews.review_description: This game feels like the next evolution of a twin stick shooter. There is depth to aiming and the command console looks really nice.
Every level is pretty much the same. Soldier has just a gun, no grenades or anything.  Got to level 3 and was bored. Not enough variety to gameplay. Too late for refund.
Super game please add more missions! Thanks
I love the old top down shooters first time I played it on VR I highly recommend this game and great price I hope u guys make more of these games great job
I really like this game I like the perspective I like the way that plays It is all around very very good definitely worth the money.  It is a great sitting down stress reliever.

this game always stuck with me. it has an interesting perspective. i think the graphics are good. offers a solid challenge.  Fun mech upgrades and sections that you infiltrate as just a soldier.  an enjoyable sit down overhead arcade  3rd person shooter. 

👌😎
This is a great game but I’ve had trouble playing co-op and online game play. If you could help me resolve this it would be much appreciated.

developer_response.body: Please drop an email to support@robosaru.com. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Really fun game but the controls feel slow giving the game a slow paced experience imo. It's probably the best isometric shooter for quest 2.
